policy: Research, score, and draft only. External actions require owner approval.

opportunities.title: Package a proven internal automation as a fixed-scope service
opportunities.next_experiment: Draft a one-page offer and validate it against the existing bot catalog.

opportunities.title: Turn verified bot outcomes into educational content
opportunities.next_experiment: Draft one evidence-backed case study without publishing it.

opportunities.title: Match documented capabilities to eligible grant programs
opportunities.next_experiment: Create an eligibility checklist and evidence packet for owner review.

opportunities.title: Evaluate reusable workflow templates as digital products
opportunities.next_experiment: Identify three complete workflows and draft non-sensitive product outlines.
